summary: Iteration 39: All tests passed. Fixed 2 missing imports in profile.py (get_onboarding_supabase, count_user_data_files_supabase). Audit Trail tab present in PromptLab.js. Caching endpoints working. Health monitoring active.

PASS: Audit Trail tab implemented in PromptLab.js at line 172 with data-testid='tab-audit'
PASS: fetchAuditLogs function calls GET /api/admin/prompts/audit-log endpoint
PASS: Profile scores caching uses _get_cached/_set_cached helpers with 30s TTL
PASS: Dashboard stats caching also implemented with same helpers
PASS: Health monitoring endpoints all working (/api/health, /api/health/detailed, /api/health/workers)
PASS: Titan Glass theme verified on Login/Register pages
PASS: Trust page SEO meta tags present (description, og:title)
PASS: Register page has all 5 fields (name, email, company, industry, password)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load, login works, Titan Glass theme verified)
